perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a Costco warehouse holding a large blue Stitch plush pillow. She smiles and points at the plush toy. (2) She flips the plush over to show a zipper on its back, opens it, and pulls out a blue fleece blanket while talking. (3) A man's hand enters the frame to feel the texture of the blanket. (4) The scene shifts to the woman holding a Winnie the Pooh plush pillow, demonstrating a similar zipper and a yellow blanket inside. (5) She hugs the large Pooh plush to show its size and continues speaking to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo background music plays continuously throughout the video. Ambient warehouse noise, including distant chatter and cart movements, is faintly audible. (2) A female voice speaks in an excited and high-pitched tone, describing the product features. (3) A male voice enters occasionally, interacting with the female speaker in a friendly, conversational manner. (4) Sound effects like 'sparkle' or 'ping' noises occur when specific text appears on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '超可愛的' (So cute), '你知道這是什麼嗎' (Do you know what this is?), '它的小屁股' (Its little butt). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. '699 超划算' (699 Great Value), '迪士尼超大趴趴枕' (Disney Giant Crawling Pillow), '毯子' (Blanket). (3) Content & Tone: The text is colorful and uses variety-show styles to emphasize excitement and the 'value' of the item.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Demo (Stitch) -> Product Demo (Pooh) -> Value Analysis

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male hand (cameraman), 1 female passer-by in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a light-colored pleated dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving units filled with toys and various products, and price tags visible on the shelves.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature 1 -> Product Feature 2 -> Price/Value Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and product demonstration. It aims to inform viewers about a specific multi-functional plush toy (Disney crawling pillow with blanket) available at Costco, emphasizing its cuteness, texture, and cost-effectiveness to encourage purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the Costco logo and detailed pricing information while showcasing a specific product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-style text overlays and direct camera engagement typical of retail-focused influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the 'treasure hunt' appeal of Costco shopping to engage viewers interested in Disney merchandise and home comfort products.
